title: lansium decandrum
intro: Lansium decandrum, also known as the Lansium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Lansium decandrum are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory issues. Lansium decandrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules for its medicinal uses, although its preparations and dosages should be determined by a healthcare professional.
